summary: An ICE-produced clip of an enforcement operation at dusk in a residential area. Officers approach a blue pickup truck parked in a driveway, then escort a man in a white tank top whose hands are cuffed behind his back, an officer in a POLICE vest beside him. Burned-in subtitles label the man a Honduran national. An ICE logo appears in the lower-right corner.

script.scene: Officers approach a blue pickup truck parked in a driveway at dusk.
An officer in a POLICE vest escorts a cuffed man in a white tank top; subtitle reads Honduran national.
Continued operation footage with the ICE logo in the corner.
